name: Antwerp (Belgium)

colors.symbolism: the historic livery of the city of Antwerp
the red of the city's coat of arms
from the city's coat of arms
from the city's coat of arms

description: A field of stepped diagonal bands running from the upper hoist toward the lower fly in white, red, white, yellow, white, blue and white.
history: The Antwerp city flag derives from the colours of the medieval Margraviate of Antwerp; the stepped diagonal pattern is registered as the official flag of the city.

features.symbolism: Stepped diagonal stripes running from the upper hoist toward the lower fly in the order white, red, white, yellow, white, blue and white, the historic livery colours of the city of Antwerp.
